instruction: In Apple Notes, list all existing notes and write all note titles into a file named "test.md" on the Desktop.
reference_command: memo notes | awk '/^[0-9]+\./ { line=$0; sub(/^[0-9]+\. /, "", line); n=split(line, parts, " - "); title=parts[n]; if (title != "") print title }' > "$HOME/Desktop/test.md"
